ocr_findings.description: Answer key line at bottom of page: image shows '問題6-14 エ　問題6-15 エ' but OCR renders '問題6-14 工 問題6-15 工' — katakana エ (answer choice) confused with kanji 工 (craft/work). This changes meaning as 工 is not a valid answer-choice character.

reviewer_notes: Page 246 contains two exam questions (6-14, 6-15) plus answer/explanation section (解答 6-1 through 6-4). エ→工 substitution in answer key line is a known OCR confusion pattern for answer pages. All other text including choice tables (ア/イ/ウ/エ columns) correctly captured.
